purpose: Materialize a Cloudflare-hosted Site Registry projection Worker, guided by Staccato's hosted surface shape without importing Staccato-specific authority.
staccato_patterns_to_lift: Worker-local route table with POST /webhook and guarded read APIs
Wrangler config with KV latest-projection binding and D1 durable rows
Bearer capability tokens split by read, publish, message submit, local admission, and admin actions
D1 inbox/message rows with source + idempotency uniqueness and receipt projection
Capability audit rows for allowed and denied requests
Local publisher and puller scripts with dry-run and finalization posture
Human peek surface that reads projection state without becoming authority

tasks.title: Specify Cloudflare hosted Site Registry projection chapter
Scaffold hosted Site Registry Cloudflare Worker package
Implement typed Site event receiver and projection storage
Implement read-only Site Registry peek API and human surface
Implement hosted registry message exchange and receipts
Add Site publisher and registry puller client tools
Add hosted registry deployment and smoke verification runbook
Run hosted Site Registry readiness proof and close chapter

requires: capability grant for Cloudflare account/worker mutation
